h473ea9a4g8607g4b60gbab7g9aa2ad344bcc: I can't fix what's wrong with you. Best pray to the Absolute for help.
h7261e59egc471g45b9g9a00ge7178bda9d0f: Only those that have faith are welcome here. Clear off before I cut you.
h1557a2c9g759eg4185ga8e1ga511637df062: Surprised to see you still standing. You ready to figure out what that critter's doing to your head?
h21c115d9g2b47g4bebg9b02g1b0beb70a130: Another special visitor. You've been touched by the Absolute, haven't you?
h4ea4e664gaaaag4d70gbc03g95a43cd0682e: Priestess Gut needs to touch you too. Hold out your arm so I can mark you.
h514bdb9dg37bbg4690gaaefg575ed41bdf5c: Enough stalling. Finish her, and be quick about it.
h466c857age36bg4771g9173gf03b3411a286: Lets the faithful recognise one another quick-sharp. That way, nobody'll mess with you.
hca9eb0e0g3c1bg4c82gb498g8a1b8d699157: And it's charged with magic. Ordinary slobs can't see it; only us that follow the Absolute.
h087246c2g8e0bg413bg93d2ga1a676517d5d: *As the pain muddles your thoughts, your minds become entangled. A familiar sensation - she too carries a parasite.*
h8dd6abd6gf377g4c24gb1c5gb8e93d78f82f: *Her faith floods into you - a tide of shuddering ecstasy. Her tadpole nestles within that mania, secure... hidden.*
he373c173g4550g45f7g9a4bgb23b537945dd: You pokin' around in my mush?
hed10d6a8gb5e4g4a4fga2d5g4d7412aebbf7: Works both ways, mate. An' I saw some weird shadows swimmin' around in your head just now.
h1d4e3b6bg722fg4887g8934gb12bf7cb96f7: I already said I'd help your mate, but I'll fix you one at a time, right here in the chapel. Send 'em through.
h57b81c61g3b8dg433dg93f1g8f8fcf3f97e9: Maybe I can help with that... didn't realise you were a True Soul.
h4a69857ag1ec6g494agbc21gb639d14dd372: I've been looking for a healer - can you help?
h318d0c23g9615g4d24gbd19gc813120d2b33: You've come to the right place.
hf2778a6fgec64g4ebfgab51g5efc8e627a16: With the Absolute's will, I can fix anything
h8107d1b1g07d7g4a5ag9532g9117b168c852: There's a creature inside my head. Can you do anything about that?
h7ad1a1d8gbe86g4fbbga1ecg3900b27c6cb3: A creature? There's definitely something rotten in there.
hfceb5fa8g0420g4703ga65cgb4477fb124b3: Let me take a closer look. I ain't seen anything like this before.
h892c466egbb9ag4742g81bcgf08a2a2ed257: I'm pretty sure you're infected too.
heb6ab761gf697g499ag9b6agc48228ddd48b: Eh? Ain't nothin' wrong with me. You're the one who's sick in the head.
h0b5e4aa0g2971g47a5g949bg21f5ce8f3f50: At this point, I'll take anything. Do what you can.
ha62c06c1gf243g4c1dg8229g780c6ec22b47: You can help me by dying quietly.
hed71bc0fg033ag4d67g9926g568e82544323: *Your minds brush against one another but are swiftly parted.*
h47b0de7cgb830g423eg8a6fg8fa6c4351f36: What are you hiding in there? There's some weird shadows swimming around.
hbaa17624g0cb7g4464gadafg51866a356aa8: I'm not letting you burn my flesh.
h52173323ge9d4g48f9g8addg5a33294959ac: Maybe you don't need me to. After all, you're special, ain't you? Like me.
h6dfe2deag2dd2g419ega9f2g71351be4aac9: *She probes your mind, tangling your thoughts with her's. A familiar sensation - she too carries a parasite.*
h269a8305gb757g4467gb685gfe9aec211862: You can't! The Absolute will crush you!
h07cb04b4g07d1g4d85gb9d7g097854f1c279: None of her friends around... perfect time for a little discreet knifework.
hca5bc39cg235dg4ba1g8235gbd296544d5d5: If we're quick about it, we can cut her throat before she calls for reinforcements.
hdf182f83g3d46g4afdgbab1g933f0e2581ef: | One of the leaders. Let's kick her butt. |
h42c927e1g4f96g49f1gbb2bg91d0b7ebb9fe: There's no one here. Can we please kill her and get on with our day?
hec05f594g271ag42fcgb43fg32c2ef50c8e6: | If we're going to take her on, this is as good a spot as any. |
h6fcf1402g44e9g4042g9b66gcead29567a3d: Weapon at the ready, chief - now's the time.
h67f665efg87fbg4a36g9093g2ef89edce7c6: You wanted to talk privately, so here we are. What's botherin' you?
hc17133dcg1265g43b2gb951g06707f0c5c03: Those shadows you saw? There's a creature inside my brain.
h20180879g2159g4573g8ce8g23feecb9f9b0: I've been searching for a healer - can you help?
h0e518d31g95c9g4538g8028gf69c8e8ac3b0: I needed a quiet corner to slaughter you in.
hff95d2c2g125dg4b3bga37dgf39f6b4927ff: The Absolute will protect me - you don't stand a chance.
hc6909896g2f0fg49b0ga3b0gfd690fae365d: One of your mates asked to talk in private, so here we are. What's botherin' you?
h6892d5aag24a9g4cfegac5fg68d6531b07c6: Ready to figure out what's going on with those shadows in your head?
hbd6d3c3fge3dag4787gb578gcb1b5b657b54: I already know what causes them - a creature in my brain.
h6dba94a4gd3eag4cafg821fg636c4c8cf716: I'm ready to kill you, actually.
h92974c18gb3c1g4449g95d4gada97fbbedaf: Don't want a crowd of gawpers. Everybody else needs to leave.
h3ca3ba9ag3f88g44c4g8b02gd6b8d35e121d: Smart. All you need to do is open yourself to the Absolute, and I'll do the rest.
h0a2eb8dfgafcfg4d9fg9f77ga7567b725c37: Don't want anyone peepin' on private matters, so...
h697c0f33gcb9bg4722ga0e7g1d807f71c717: Can't get any privacy around here...
h59442e4dgba4dg424bg89e9gba428cfeab1e: *Psionic feelers creep across your mind, like a pickpocket's fingers seeking flaws in fabric.*
hc2cc1286gd4f0g419fgaeeag94f0e4ded7b6: It's all slippery in there. What are you hiding?
h24bc7b53g62b4g46d7g962bg5d56a3ab33f9: Relax your mind, directing her to the memory of your infection.
hd1142cffg0f7eg465dgb766g74deb14c696e: *An image of the mind flayer reaches out to her from your memories.*
he5a40f81gaaa0g4cf2g9e2dg8e2adb80d249: This ain't right. Why are you resisting me if you're one with the Absolute?
h04979e7eg3b68g4f53g8d95gcd7ed5a62101: *You repel her mental probes, concealing your memories.*
hb40c94cbgb57eg4cfega377g5da2053bceaf: There's something wicked burrowed in your brain. I can't get a grip on it. Best start praying for help.
hf61f3653g2ce1g4cacg8ccdgc9df3f77f381: *She prises your mental barriers apart... and sees the mind flayer from the ship.*
hb26122dbg79d5g4120ga151ge4c7ff97aef7: Hells.That is horrible. Can see why you'd want to keep it secret.
h5ce5bc4aged39g483ag9d8dg2cb80378312e: But there's no secrets between us, True Soul. Lemme take a look and find out what it did to you.
h912123a9gc468g4cb9gb77dg3f2d53af2f47: Allow her to rummage through your memories.
h59e9a4edg658bg4654ga3e8g6fe44c515cc9: *Sifting deeper, she sees the mind flayer holding a wriggling tadpole to your eye.*
h9d2249dfga5d8g4a02g920fgb7fd23adf10e: *And then the vision lurches, and you are looking through her eyes as a tadpole squirms into her skull.*
h7710c6a7g5977g4072gad37g90ae3b848c94: Hells. We need to fish that thing out before it eats any important parts of your brain.
hfcdbd89egb8feg4639g80b4g4f5ea935e6c7: Then get it out of me.
h51a469c0ga171g4d61g9e51g6963864cf3d1: Don't you worry. I've got everythin' I need to fix you. Might get a bit messy though.
hf0c24973g3ae1g4ff5g8d26g917a5c578577: Give me a little time to prepare.
hb18a707bg40cag4f31g90bdge358d7bdebfc: Time's the one thing you don't have. We've gotta get this thing out now.
haa8fdf95gbba6g4a79gb5adg0db634f132f5: What exactly does your plan involve?
hba24de7fg763bg4b7eg8227g60d6410932d5: It involves you puttin' yer trust in the Absolute. Simple.
h332224c6gade5g4677ga0dfgd5d07b8fa1fd: I don't think so. Time to die.
h003eccd9g67e9g4c73gad99gbf3d4f21ecd2: I still have my senses. I'll find another way to deal with it.
h4f1d7956g9e1dg4a54ga1f6g72741e5d9b3f: No. You ain't leaving until we get to the bottom of this. You could be dangerous.
hb397b8e0gc8a5g4d12gb808g408d3f51db2f: Do whatever you have to. Just get rid of it.
h3fc217d8g9146g4630gaa10ge2633733bf4e: Being a True Soul, you know the Absolute don't like to touch nothing unclean.
h5adfb25dgf960g47d4ga312g03db8985be68: So drink this. It'll purify ya.
h2663c708g968ag4d9cg8dc2geb370bcdec7a: *You recognise telltale flecks of werejackal blood - it's a potion of sleep.*
hfd1e41c4g3133g4161g9d00g2701313a7871: That'll put me to sleep - are you trying to trick me?
h4f078c8eg511cg413agbf74g838f9727cb0d: I ain't deceiving nobody. I'm tryin' to help!
he70eb08dg8295g484fg9cf1ga9030c6aa505: I don't think so. You're finished.
h1a3dcf36g9aa4g4af1gb1ffgb2dd9d9aba19: This could have gone easy for you. Not now though. I'll tear you to shreds!
h98f07db0g4cbcg4baegb4cfg7e697ffa8157: Sweet dreams. I'll see your ugly mug on the other side.
hacc494b2gbd2ag4ea7gae94g74029af94ee9: I guess we're doing this the hard way then.
hd8127147gfbd0g4510ga2a3gef581cd71bc7: It's a liquid blessing. It'll cleanse you - and it tastes better than the rotgut at the party.
hd01a931ega6eag4850g89a2g7457dc9e288d: Hang on - somebody's nabbed my potion.
he11b5697g43ccg4225g8321g7925d2dce095: One of those things is inside you too, you know.
h5c0a4041g9406g4ab6gbde3gf36b2c485bef: No. It's messing with your brain. You're seeing things - probably hearing voices too, yeah?
hf3c8d39cg78dcg4218g8294g796397355f01: Pretty sure one of those parasites is squirming in your head too.
hab70e727g88beg433cg8ca1g4d05797984ab: I've heard enough - time to die.
h804de5e2g5999g4bd8g87e5g61836c13cd00: There we go. Secret and safe. Well...secret.
h3941877ag32e1g48f3g94a6g6f84b16bc5a4: What exactly are you going to do?
h3ad0f6d1g0138g455eg9809g34b45b986d07: Whatever the Absolute tells me to. Don't worry - She loves you. I can tell.
h8dc7dbdegf675g4a3bgae8fg9f1184f28278: Change of plan. I'm going to kill you.
h2c90916egce28g4fd7g8d20g680d79c7d129: Let's get your head fixed once and for all.
